summary: Great‑sounding matrix recording featuring a beautifully played Brokedown Palace and a gorgeous Bird Song in the first set
review: The reviewer praises this matrix source as “great sounding,” noting clear, balanced audio that captures the band well. Musically the first set shines with a wonderfully rendered later‑era Brokedown Palace and an especially beautiful Bird Song, leaving listeners eager for the second set.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but its enthusiastic language rates both performance and recording highly; limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a ‘great sounding’ matrix mix – clear, well‑balanced, no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive comments focus on the first set; reviewer highlights strong playing and expresses excitement for a second set.
